stories.title: Create _sass/ partials by selector domain
stories.description: Audit assets/css/style.css (1133 lines), partition into 8 partials under _sass/ following the target partitioning in plan step 2. Each selector must appear in exactly one partial.
acceptanceCriteria: _sass/ directory exists at repo root
_sass/_base.scss contains @font-face declarations and root/* rules
_sass/_layout.scss contains .page-wrapper, .left-margin, .right-margin, .main-container, .sky-blue-gap, .content-wrapper, .background-image-layer rules
_sass/_nav.scss contains .nav-column, .nav-container, .navsubContainer, .nav-item, .vertical-divider, .me-image, .news-section, .news-item rules
_sass/_content.scss contains .content-column, .content-area, .info-section-*, .align-target, .horizontal-line, .highlight, .sub-text, .callout-* rules
_sass/_projects.scss contains .project-* and .tag.* rules
_sass/_publications.scss contains .publication-* rules
_sass/_vision.scss contains .vision-subgoals, .subgoal-* rules
_sass/_utilities.scss contains @keyframes, .slide-*, .navsubContainer-slide-*, transitions
No selector appears in two partials (verifiable via grep -l)

stories.title: Replace style.css with style.scss entry
stories.description: Create assets/css/style.scss with @use imports of all 8 partials. Delete assets/css/style.css after verifying compiled _site output matches.
acceptanceCriteria: assets/css/style.scss exists with Jekyll front matter (--- / ---)
style.scss uses @use 'base'; @use 'layout'; @use 'nav'; @use 'content'; @use 'projects'; @use 'publications'; @use 'vision'; @use 'utilities'; (fallback to @import if Dart Sass version unsupported)
assets/css/style.css is deleted from the repo
bundle exec jekyll build exits 0 with no new Sass deprecation warnings

_site/assets/css/style.css is regenerated and visually equivalent to the pre-refactor output (ImageMagick compare -metric AE -fuzz 1% shows zero structural diffs across initial-load screenshots of sections 1/2/3/4 at 1920x1080)

stories.title: Insert 5 role-grouped section headers in main.js
stories.description: Add 5 comment headers in assets/js/main.js without moving function bodies. Zero behavior change.
acceptanceCriteria: main.js contains // === Data Loading === above the const siteInfo line
main.js contains // === Rendering === above generateVisionSubgoals()
main.js contains // === Section Switching === above loadSectionContent()
main.js contains // === Layout & Divider === above updateVerticalDivider()
main.js contains // === Utilities === above initializeClock()
git diff shows ONLY comment-insertion lines and (at most) whitespace; no function-body reordering
All existing features (section switch, subgoal expand, clock, card render) still work identically after the edit

stories.title: Add <1024px desktop-only notice (CSS + HTML)
stories.description: Add .desktop-only-notice element to default.html and CSS @media (max-width: 1023.98px) rule in _utilities.scss that hides .page-wrapper + .nav-column and shows the notice. Plus updateVerticalDivider guard for hidden state (R4 mitigation).
acceptanceCriteria:
_layouts/default.html contains

...desktop...

after
_sass/_utilities.scss contains @media (max-width: 1023.98px) rule that sets .page-wrapper and .nav-column display:none, .desktop-only-notice display:flex fixed inset:0
At viewport 1023px the notice is visible and the page-wrapper is hidden
At viewport 1024px the notice is hidden and the page-wrapper is visible
updateVerticalDivider in main.js early-returns if activeNavItem.getBoundingClientRect() returns zero dimensions (avoids errors when nav-column is display:none below 1024px)

stories.title: Bug A - profile image alt
stories.description: Set meImage.alt to a meaningful string at initializeNavsubContainer.
acceptanceCriteria: assets/js/main.js initializeNavsubContainer sets meImage.alt to `Portrait of ${siteInfo.name}` (or equivalent non-empty descriptive string) before appendChild
DOM inspect after load shows

stories.title: Bug B - nav as <button> + aria + neutralization
stories.description: Change <div class="nav-item"> to <button class="nav-item" type="button">. Add event.preventDefault() in handleNavClick. Add aria-current="page" on active item. Neutralize default <button> styling in _nav.scss without breaking layout.
acceptanceCriteria: _layouts/default.html has 4 <button class="nav-item" data-section="N" type="button"> elements replacing the prior 4 <div class="nav-item"> elements
Initial markup sets aria-current="page" on the section-1 button
switchSection updates aria-current="page" on the newly active button and removes it from inactive ones
handleNavClick calls event.preventDefault() at the top
_sass/_nav.scss has neutralization (appearance:none; background:none; border:none; padding:0; font:inherit; color:inherit; cursor:pointer) BEFORE the existing .nav-item layout rules
Tab key cycles through the 4 nav buttons; pressing Enter or Space activates the focused button
Visible focus outline appears on the focused nav button (via :focus-visible)
Section switching behaves identically to pre-refactor (clicking switches sections without page reload)

stories.title: Bug C - replace max-height 1500px with scrollHeight + transitionend
stories.description: Rewrite toggleSubgoalDetail open/close to use scrollHeight measurement, transitionend listener, and final max-height:none on open so content > 1500px is not truncated.
acceptanceCriteria: On open, main.js sets detailElement.style.maxHeight = detailElement.scrollHeight + 'px'
On transitionend (or via setTimeout matching the CSS transition duration as fallback), maxHeight is set to 'none'
On close, main.js first sets maxHeight = scrollHeight + 'px', forces reflow via void detailElement.offsetHeight, then sets maxHeight = '0'

Manual test: inject a

> 1500px tall into one subgoal-detail in DevTools and click Detail >; the entire content shows without truncation
Open then close cycle works smoothly with no flash of full content and no visual jump

stories.title: Bug D - news YAML line breaks via CSS
stories.description: Add .news-content { white-space: pre-line; } to _sass/_nav.scss. Keep newsContent.textContent = news.content in main.js (no innerHTML).
acceptanceCriteria: _sass/_nav.scss contains .news-content { white-space: pre-line; }
main.js initializeNavsubContainer still uses newsContent.textContent = news.content (NOT innerHTML)
Manual test: a news item with a literal \n in its YAML content block shows a visible line break in the rendered output

stories.title: Bug E - verify-then-dedup duplicate render listener
stories.description: Diagnose whether main.js:606-609 DOMContentLoaded listener does any work. Per Architect analysis, getElementById returns null at that timing so renderProjectCards/renderPublicationCards early-return. If confirmed no-op, delete the block; otherwise add idempotency guard.
acceptanceCriteria: main.js:606-609 DOMContentLoaded listener block is either (a) removed because verified no-op (commit message documents the verification), or (b) replaced with an idempotency guard so renderProjectCards/renderPublicationCards run exactly once per section load
Console instrumentation confirms exactly one call to renderProjectCards on first section-3 visit (no duplicates from the deleted listener)
Section 3 (Projects) and Section 4 (Publications) still render their cards correctly on first visit and on re-visits

stories.title: Bug F - document.fonts.load('1em target-haas') guard
stories.description: Replace the 50ms setTimeout in loadSectionContent that computes .horizontal-line width with document.fonts.load('1em target-haas').then(...). target-haas is the font used by .align-target per style.css:543, 553.
acceptanceCriteria: main.js loadSectionContent computes .horizontal-line width inside document.fonts.load('1em target-haas').then(() => { ... }) callback
The setTimeout(..., 50) hack at main.js:466 is removed

After document.fonts.load resolves, .horizontal-line.offsetWidth does not change by more than 1px for 2 seconds under DevTools Network throttle "Slow 3G" (verified via temporary ResizeObserver or polled snapshots; instrumentation removed before commit)

stories.title: Bug J - visible :focus-visible styles
stories.description: Add :focus-visible CSS rules to _sass/_utilities.scss covering all interactive elements (a, button, .nav-item).
acceptanceCriteria: _sass/_utilities.scss contains a :focus-visible rule with outline:2px solid #1a1a1a; outline-offset:2px or equivalent visible focus indicator
Tab key produces a visible focus ring on all <a> and <button> elements (verified via DevTools Element panel + Tab key navigation)
Focus ring does not cause layout shift (verified via DevTools Layout Shift indicator)

stories.title: Phase 2 verification: Lighthouse + 6-item smoke checklist
stories.description: Run Lighthouse Desktop and the R7 6-item smoke checklist on local jekyll-serve.
acceptanceCriteria: .omc/lighthouse/ directory created via mkdir -p
Lighthouse Desktop run yields Best Practices >= 90 and Accessibility >= 90; JSON archived to .omc/lighthouse/phase2.json
R7 smoke item (1): Vision section subgoals 0-3 open within ~300ms with no clipping/jump/horizontal scroll
R7 smoke item (2): Vision section subgoals 0-3 close smoothly with no flash of full content
R7 smoke item (3): Subgoal with >1500px content shows full content (Bug C verification)
R7 smoke item (4): Section switch 1->2->3->4->1 lands the vertical divider correctly without overshoot
R7 smoke item (5): Slow 3G reload settles .horizontal-line width with no shift >1px after fonts.load resolves
R7 smoke item (6): Tab through nav buttons shows visible focus ring with no layout shift

stories.title: Update _config.yml url: to CNAME
stories.description: Change url field from https://memorialStar.github.io to https://www.youngminjung.com. MUST run before head metadata changes.
acceptanceCriteria: _config.yml url field equals "https://www.youngminjung.com"
bundle exec jekyll build succeeds
_site output files reference the new host in absolute_url-derived URLs

stories.title: Add full <head> metadata block
stories.description: Insert <meta description>, OG tags (title/description/url/image=me.jpg/type=profile/locale=en_US/locale:alternate=ko_KR), Twitter card (summary_large_image), JSON-LD Person (name, url, inLanguage:en, affiliation=KAIST, sameAs=[LinkedIn, X]), <link rel=canonical> into _layouts/default.html.
acceptanceCriteria: _layouts/default.html <head> contains <meta name="description" content="{{ site.description }}">
_layouts/default.html <head> contains <link rel="canonical" href="{{ page.url | absolute_url }}">
_layouts/default.html <head> contains OG block: og:type=profile, og:title, og:description, og:url, og:image (absolute_url for /assets/img/me.jpg), og:locale=en_US, og:locale:alternate=ko_KR
_layouts/default.html <head> contains Twitter block: twitter:card=summary_large_image, twitter:title, twitter:description, twitter:image

_layouts/default.html <head> contains JSON-LD <script type="application/ld+json"> with @type:Person, name, url, inLanguage:en, affiliation { @type:EducationalOrganization, name:KAIST }, sameAs:[LinkedIn URL, X URL]
bundle exec jekyll build succeeds; rendered _site/index.html contains all of the above tags with no Liquid errors

stories.title: Add jekyll-sitemap plugin
stories.description: Add jekyll-sitemap to Gemfile :jekyll_plugins group and _config.yml plugins list. Run bundle install. Verify sitemap.xml generates.
acceptanceCriteria: Gemfile :jekyll_plugins block includes gem "jekyll-sitemap"
_config.yml plugins list includes - jekyll-sitemap
bundle install completes without errors and updates Gemfile.lock
bundle exec jekyll build produces _site/sitemap.xml with valid XML structure
_site/assets/css/style.css is still produced (Sass/sitemap interaction safe)

stories.title: Add robots.txt
stories.description: Create robots.txt at repo root with Allow: / and Sitemap link.
acceptanceCriteria: robots.txt exists at repo root
robots.txt contains User-agent: * and Allow: / and Sitemap: https://www.youngminjung.com/sitemap.xml
bundle exec jekyll build copies robots.txt to _site/robots.txt

stories.title: Create docs/AUTHORING.md cheatsheet
stories.description: Public, GitHub-rendered authoring cheatsheet covering project/publication/news entry, image rule, * escape, new-section warning.
acceptanceCriteria: docs/AUTHORING.md exists in repo
AUTHORING.md has section: Add a project entry (with sample YAML block citing _data/projects.yml first entry)
AUTHORING.md has section: Add a publication (with sample YAML, * escape note for asterisks in author names)
AUTHORING.md has section: Add a news item (with multi-line content: | YAML block scalar example)
AUTHORING.md has section: Image conversion rule (<=1600px width, prefer .webp, place in assets/img/projects/)
AUTHORING.md has section: Adding a new top-level section (advanced) noting main.js sectionData[] + default.html nav-container + _data/*.yml requirement
AUTHORING.md renders cleanly on github.com (no broken markdown syntax)
